news.headline: Analyst reiterates Outperform rating and $205 price target on Alphabet Inc. ahead of earnings, sees limited upside potential due to advertising challenges from competitors.
news.summary: Wedbush analyst Scott Devitt has reiterated an Outperform rating and set a $205 price target for Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) ahead of earnings on October 29. In a recent note, Devitt described Alphabet as an "above average company" with a "below average multiple." Despite achievable advertising growth estimates for the quarter, potential upside is limited due to mixed feedback from Wedbush’s third-quarter Digital Advertising Survey and Skai data indicating a slowdown in Google Search growth. Devitt also highlighted competitive pressure from Amazon.com Inc.’s (NASDAQ:AMZN) Prime Video ads and increased digital video ad inventory impacting YouTube's performance. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: TradePMR introduces Fusion SYNC to streamline RIA transitions, an automated solution to simplify custodian transfers.
news.summary: In Gainesville, Florida, TradePMR, a provider of technology and custodial services for RIAs, has introduced Fusion SYNC, an automated solution catered to financial advisors. Fusion SYNC aims to simplify the transition process to a new custodian, a task known to be complex. Through the utilization of AI technology, Fusion SYNC permits RIA firms to streamline the transition by uploading their entire client approved information dataset. This automated process facilitates the transition process, offering efficiency and ease to RIAs.

news.headline: Intelligent Blends expands with new automated pouching line to meet co-packing needs; launched successfully on Oct 24, 2024.
news.summary: In San Diego on October 24, 2024, Intelligent Blends announced the successful debut of a cutting-edge automated pouching manufacturing line. This development significantly boosts our capacity to cater to the varied requirements of our co-packing clients. The expansion aligns smoothly with our existing powder production facilities and underscores our commitment to innovation and efficiency in serving our customers.

news.headline: Knute Nelson and Walker Methodist rebrand to Vivie, offering home health care, hospice, senior living, rehab services.
news.summary: Knute Nelson and Walker Methodist have revealed their new brand, Vivie, in Alexandria, Minn. The rebrand showcases their range of services, including home health care, hospice, senior living, rehab, and more.

news.headline: Stellar Bancorp (NYSE:STEL) to report EPS of $0.48 in latest earnings update. Investors eager for news exceeding estimates.
news.summary: Stellar Bancorp, listed on the NYSE as STEL, is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on Friday, October 25, 2024. Analysts are predicting that the company will announce an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.48. The update from Stellar Bancorp is highly awaited by investors who are hopeful for a performance that exceeds these projections and positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. Market enthusiasts are advised to stay tuned for further developments on this matter.

news.headline: Sensient Tech (NYSE:SXT) to report $0.80 EPS on Oct 25. Previous earnings saw a share price drop of 0.0%, EPS missed by $0.05. Shares trading at $77.09, up 37.79% in the last 52 weeks. One analyst rates SXT as Outperform.
news.summary: Sensient Technologies (NYSE:SXT) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on October 25, with analysts predicting an EPS of $0.80. The company missed EPS by $0.05 in the previous quarter, resulting in a 0.0% drop in share price. In the last four quarters, EPS estimates ranged from 0.51 to 0.82, with actual EPS between 0.75 and 0.79, leading to price changes of -5.0% to 2.0%. Shares were trading at $77.09 on October 23, up 37.79% in the past year. Analysts have given Sensient Technologies a consensus rating of Outperform. Investors should focus not only on earnings beats or misses but also on future guidance for stock price impact.

news.headline: World Acceptance (NASDAQ:WRLD) to report EPS of $1.99 on 2024-10-25. Investors optimistic for positive results.
news.summary: World Acceptance, trading on NASDAQ under the ticker WRLD, is scheduled to release its quarterly earnings report on Friday, October 25, 2024. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.99 for the company. The market anticipates the announcement eagerly, hoping for World Acceptance to exceed these estimates and offer positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. Investors are advised to stay tuned for further updates as the news unfolds.

news.headline: MGIC declares $0.13/share dividend, payable on Nov 21, to shareholders of record on Nov 7.
news.summary: In Milwaukee on October 24, 2024, MGIC Investment Corporation (NYSE: MTG) disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.13 per share. This dividend is set to be paid on November 21, 2024, to shareholders who are recorded as of November 7, 2024. MGIC Mortgage Guaranty is the focus of the company.

news.headline: Novavax stock drops after FDA halts testing of two products due to side effects. Investors concerned if NVAX is a sell.
news.summary: Novavax faced a setback in mid-October when the FDA halted its request to initiate testing for two new products, causing a decline in NVAX stock. Investors may be questioning whether or not to sell shares given this development.

news.headline: ITT's technical performance improves with Relative Strength Rating upgrade, keeping industry moving according to Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: ITT has received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating a positive trend in its technical performance. Despite not being considered particularly innovative, ITT plays a crucial role in driving the industry forward.

news.headline: TourRadar launches revamped mobile app for booking adventures, featuring new search system and mobile-friendly payment methods.
news.summary: TourRadar, a top adventure platform, has launched a revamped mobile app in Vienna, Austria. This update simplifies the process for travelers to search, find, and reserve their desired adventures on-the-go. The new app provides exclusive discounts and contests, enhancing user experience. It includes a new search and recommendation system, along with mobile-native payment methods. This aims to offer a seamless experience to users looking for adventure, with the app serving as a one-stop solution.

news.headline: World's first robotic surgery using Meta Quest and 3D visualization showcases Augmented Reality. Levita Magnetics' MARS system offers improved depth perception for faster, precise procedures. Groundbreaking advancement in medical science.
news.summary: A cutting-edge MARS robotic system by Levita Magnetics in Mountain View, California, is revolutionizing surgical procedures with superior depth perception. Launched on Oct. 24, 2024, this innovative technology is enhancing accuracy and speed in surgeries. Surgeons in Santiago recently utilized this system for the first time, marking a significant milestone in medical innovation.

news.headline: Kindred Group applies for delisting following FDJ's public offer of SEK 130 per SDR to holders.
news.summary: In Sliema, Malta, on October 24, 2024, La Française des Jeux SA ("FDJ") has put forth a suggested public offer to holders of Swedish Depository Receipts (SDRs) in Kindred Group plc ("Kindred"). The proposal is for these holders to submit all their SDRs in the Company for a cash amount of SEK 130 each.

news.headline: Burnham Holdings, Inc. released Q3 2024 financial results, with revenues reaching $52.5 million.
news.summary: Burnham Holdings, Inc. based in Lancaster, Pennsylvania, announced its financial results for the third quarter of 2024. The company, traded under OTC-Pink as BURCA, reported a total revenue of $X million, representing a X% increase from the same period last year. Net income for the quarter stood at $X million. These figures have been restated for comparison due to a voluntary change in accounting methods. Burnham Holdings, Inc. expressed satisfaction with its performance during the quarter and remains optimistic about its future prospects.

news.headline: October new-vehicle sales expected to rise by 10% from last month and nearly 8% from last year despite election uncertainties and weather events.
news.summary: October is projected to see a sales volume increase of 10% compared to September and nearly 8% higher than the same month last year, due to having more selling days. Sales may be affected by election uncertainties and weather disruptions in the Southeast region.

news.headline: Cox Enterprises invests $300 million in Socium Ventures to support innovation in durable companies, and David Yang joins as Partner.
news.summary: A new Partner, David Yang, has recently joined Socium Ventures, a venture and growth investment firm based in Atlanta. Specializing in investing in durable and compounding companies, Socium Ventures has announced the launch of its second fund which amounts to $300 million.

news.headline: AuditBoard and Protiviti enhance audit management capabilities at conference in Las Vegas on Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: During the Audit & Beyond Conference in Las Vegas on October 24, 2024, AuditBoard, a prominent cloud-based platform revolutionizing audit, risk, and compliance management, disclosed plans for expansion through a technology alliance with Protiviti, a worldwide consulting firm. This alliance signifies a significant step towards enhancing technological capabilities in the audit and consulting sectors. The announcement unveils a collaboration that merges AuditBoard's innovative solutions with Protiviti's expertise, promising mutual benefits to both entities. This initiative is poised to significantly impact the industry, potentially revolutionizing audit and compliance practices. The event saw the participation of a substantial number of industry professionals, with early estimates indicating a strong positive response to the proposed partnership.

news.headline: Vitamin K supplement delays prostate cancer progression in mice, promising discovery at Cold Spring Harbor Lab. Characters: 100
news.summary: In Cold Spring Harbor, New York, a recent finding at Cold Spring Harbor Laboratory (CSHL) suggests that prostate cancer, a commonly treatable disease in men, can become highly lethal in certain instances where it does not respond to existing treatments. This discovery was announced on Oct. 24, 2024, highlighting the severity of cases where the cancer becomes resistant to known therapies. This breakthrough research sheds light on the alarming potential of prostate cancer to transform into a silent but deadly threat.

news.headline: Ioneer's project receives final permit approval for lithium-boron project in Nevada, with construction planned for 2025.
news.summary: Ioneer Ltd recently announced that they have secured federal approval for their Rhyolite Ridge Lithium-Boron Project from the Bureau of Land Management. This project, which is listed on the ASX as INR and NASDAQ as IONR, marks the first lithium project in the U.S. to receive the green light from the Biden Administration. This move is in line with the administration's goal of boosting domestic critical mineral production. The approval paves the way for the development of the project in Esmeralda County, Nevada, with construction set to begin in 2025 and production expected to commence in 2028.

news.headline: National Press Club president addresses safety concerns for 6 Al Jazeera journalists in North Gaza accused of terrorism by IDF.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, Emily Wilkins, the 117th President of the National Press Club, issued a statement concerning the safety of six Al Jazeera journalists operating in Northern Gaza. The Israeli Defense Forces have accused them of terrorism. The journalists' well-being is a matter of concern as they continue their work amidst these allegations.

news.headline: ECB's Wunsch: Risks are still relatively balanced.
ECB's Wunsch: A few changes could impact inflation in both directions.
ECB's Wunsch: Domestic inflation in Europe is still very high.
KBRA assigns ratings to $253.1M GSMBS 2024-HE2 RMBS sponsored by Goldman Sachs Mortgage. 98.3% 2nd lien HELOC loans.
news.summary: In New York, KBRA has assigned preliminary ratings to 6 classes of mortgage-backed notes from GS Mortgage-Backed Securities Trust 2024-HE2 (GSMBS 2024-HE2). This transaction, sponsored by Goldman Sachs Mortgage Company, is worth $253.1 million. GSMBS 2024-HE2 is made up of first lien (1.7%) and second lien (98.3%) home equity line of credit (HELOC) loans. The pool includes 2,546 loans with an average seasoning of approximately six months. United Wholesale Mortgage, LLC represents 69.5% of the loans in the pool.

news.headline: Mother claims chatbot Daenerys Targaryen from Character.AI contributed to 14-year-old Florida boy's suicide.
news.summary: A woman from Florida revealed that her 14-year-old son developed an unhealthy fixation on a chatbot through the platform Character.AI, leading to his tragic death.

news.headline: ECB's Wunsch: We don't need a discussion on 50 bps at this stage.
ECB's Wunsch: Europe's economy is weaker than we thought.
Sangoma to release Q1 fiscal 2025 results on Nov 6, 2024, with conference call at 5:30 PM ET.
news.summary: Sangoma Technologies Corporation (TSX: STC; Nasdaq: SANG) based in Markham, Ontario, a key provider of cloud-based Communications as a Service solutions, is set to unveil its Q1 fiscal year 2025 results post-market closure on November 6, 2024. The Company plans to conduct a conference call at 5:30 PM Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the outcomes.

news.headline: Poll: Trump and Harris tied in dead heat with equal support numbers.
NJ organizations receive $100,000 through American Water Charitable Foundation's grant program for workforce readiness.
news.summary: In Camden, New Jersey, New Jersey American Water revealed that the American Water Charitable Foundation has granted $25,000 each to four local organizations. These organizations include Boys and Girls Clubs of Union County, Hopeworks, Junior Achievement of New Jersey, and Salem County Inter-Agency Council of Human Services. The grants from the foundation's 2024 Workforce Readiness program aim to enhance general career readiness, financial and business literacy, positive youth development, and life skills training. This initiative underscores the commitment to supporting these critical areas in the local community.

news.headline: Incode Technologies ranked as Leader in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Identity Verification, top for Completeness of Vision.
news.summary: Incode Technologies has recently been acknowledged as a frontrunner in the industry, securing the leading spot for having the most comprehensive vision. This recognition comes as a testament to Incode's position as a top provider of cutting-edge identity verification and authentication services for businesses worldwide. The announcement was made in San Francisco on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: College plans to sell portion of Manhattan campus to avoid default, news reports.
Procurant chosen by Superfresh Growers for EDI and sales order collaboration with retail grocers in Watsonville, California.
news.summary: Superfresh Growers, based in Watsonville, California, has decided to partner with Procurant to streamline their Electronic Data Interchange (EDI) processes and enhance electronic sales order collaboration with retail grocers. This move signifies Superfresh Growers' commitment to improving efficiency in their operations.

news.headline: Fnac Darty/Unieuro: Antitrust waiver secured; sizeable portion of capital tendered so far.
Former FTX exec praised by US gov’t for cooperation before sentencing; prosecutors highlight Nishad Singh's help in case against Sam Bankman-Fried.
news.summary: During the sentencing hearing for Sam Bankman-Fried, prosecutors urged Judge Lewis Kaplan to take into account Nishad Singh's significant cooperation with the government. Singh provided valuable assistance in the case, which involved allegations against Bankman-Fried. The prosecution emphasized the importance of Singh's assistance in the legal proceedings.

news.headline: Bitcoin whales increase holdings to record high of 670K during recent price drop; v-shaped recovery hints at new highs.
news.summary: In the midst of a recent decrease in Bitcoin's price, large investors, known as whales, have been increasing their holdings. The current rapid recovery in the value of Bitcoin, forming a v-shaped pattern, suggests the possibility of reaching new all-time highs in the near future.

news.headline: Polymarket reveals Trump as potential key player for 2024 US election, leading in all six swing states.
news.summary: The latest Polymarket data on the 2024 US election shows that former President Trump is predicted to emerge victorious in all six crucial swing states.

news.headline: Director behind Independence Day to make TV series on Web3 game “Space Nation”, utilizing new distribution methods.
news.summary: The television series, inspired by the popular "Space Nation" game, intends to utilize alternative distribution methods like second-window broadcasts for streaming platforms instead of traditional channels.

news.headline: Stocks drop, GM has best day in a year, Gold breaks records, Silver hits 12-year highs. Wall Street cautious due to elections, IMF flags concerns over US debt trajectory, Gold up 0.8% and miners up 34% YTD. Silver surges 2.8%.
news.summary: Wall Street traded lower for the second day as concerns over the U.S. presidential election, fiscal policies, and economic shifts impacted investor sentiment. The International Monetary Fund upgraded U.S. growth forecasts for 2024 and 2025, but also warned about rising debt trajectory. Commodity markets saw notable gains, with gold rising 0.8% and year-to-date performance hitting 34%. Gold miners rallied for the ninth session, reaching four-year highs. Silver surged 2.8%, reaching levels not seen since October. Gold may see strongest annual gain since 1979.

news.headline: Ankr incorporates TON into Web3 API, enabling developers to accelerate development on the TON network without node management.
news.summary: Reportedly, developers will no longer have to manage nodes due to the integration by Ankr, leading to quicker development on the TON network.

news.headline: Niche, artist-led music festivals set to dominate the future, as per Bloomberg.
Kendall-Jackson partners with NBA teams Sacramento Kings, Orlando Magic, and Phoenix Suns, expanding its reach.
news.summary: In Sonoma County, California, on October 24, 2024, Kendall-Jackson, known for creating the top-selling Chardonnay in America, revealed extended partnerships with the Sacramento Kings, the Orlando Magic, and the Phoenix Suns. These new multiyear deals signify a significant growth phase for Kendall-Jackson.

news.headline: PGA TOUR Superstore becomes top spot for in-home golf simulators during gifting season, as golftainment trend rises.
news.summary: The increasing popularity of golftainment and indoor golfing has established a new trend for families, friends, and neighbors looking to stay on par with the latest golfing trends. PGA TOUR Superstore, the top destination in the U.S. for golf gear, accessories, and clothing, has reported significant growth in this area. This rise indicates a shift towards in-home golf experiences.

news.headline: EOS Network completes Spring 1.0 hard fork & exSat mainnet launch, significant milestones achieved. Key updates shared in October BP meeting.
news.summary: The EOS Network recently reached a major milestone by successfully implementing the Spring 1.0 hard fork and introducing the exSat mainnet. These developments were highlighted during the latest Block Producer meeting held in October. This signifies an important step forward in the network's growth and enhancement, with crucial updates being shared with stakeholders. The completion of the hard fork and the launch of exSat represent key achievements in the ongoing development of EOS, showcasing the progress made in advancing the platform.

news.headline: Global Colemanite market expected to reach USD 2.36B by 2033 with 4.7% CAGR. Demand was USD 1.45B in 2023, projected to be USD 1.56B in 2024.
news.summary: The global Colemanite market was valued at approximately USD 1.45 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach USD 1.56 billion in 2024. By 2033, it is expected to reach around USD 2.36 billion, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 4.7% during the forecast period 2024 to 2033. Key growth factors include the rising demand for borates in industries like glass, ceramics, agriculture, and detergents, technological advancements in mining and processing, sustainable mining practices, economic growth in emerging markets, and expansion of production capacities by major players in the market. Major partnerships and acquisitions in the industry have also been highlighted.

news.headline: VA Secretary McDonough to speak at NPC Headliners Breakfast on Oct 29 to discuss state of veterans and families. Register at press.org for the event.
news.summary: In Washington, a significant announcement is scheduled for Tuesday, October 24, 2024, regarding the status of American veterans and their families. Secretary Denis McDonough will provide this update. For more information and to sign up for the event, visit the link: https://www.press.org/events/npc-headliners-veterans-affairs-secretary-denis-mcdonough. McDonough took office as the...

news.headline: DENSO, a Japan-based manufacturer, to add 200 jobs in Athens, TN, expanding production for cleaner mobility solutions.
news.summary: Japanese-based manufacturing company plans to create 200 new jobs in Athens, Tennessee, as part of their initiative to boost production of products that promote environmentally-friendly transportation. The expansion is set to create a positive impact on the region's economy, supported by Governor Bill Lee and Department of Economic and Community Development Commissioner Stuart C. McWhorter.

news.headline: g-20: We see risk of economic divergence.
G-20: We aim to reduce growth disparities via structural reforms.
ARIA in Boca Raton gets full license for inpatient detox and Residential Level 1; Ethema Health Corp subsidiary.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, Ethema Health Corporation's subsidiary ARIA received its license to operate an inpatient detoxication and Residential Level 1 facility in West Palm Beach, Florida. Ethema Health Corporation is listed as OTCPINK: GRST. This news was announced on October 24, 2024.
